requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Top Runner Program for Household Refrigerators (Act on the Rational Use of Energy / METI)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——家用电冰箱领跑者计划（能源使用合理化法 / METI）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——家用電冰箱領跑者計畫（能源使用合理化法 / METI）

summary.en: Energy efficiency for household refrigerators in Japan is regulated under the Act on the Rational Use of Energy (Energy Conservation Act / 省エネ法), administered by METI, through the Top Runner Program. Refrigerators are a designated Top Runner product category. METI sets a 'target standard value' (目標基準値) for energy efficiency for each category and rated-volume class, benchmarked to the most efficient products on the market at the time the standard is set (the 'top runner'). Manufacturers and importers that ship designated products must achieve, on a weighted shipment-average basis, at least the target standard value for the relevant target fiscal year; they must measure and report energy consumption, and shipments that fail to meet the target can trigger METI recommendations, publication, orders, and penalties against the business operator. Energy consumption is measured according to JIS C 9801 (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods). Unlike the EU's per-model EEI hard limit, the Top Runner obligation is a fleet-weighted-average obligation on the business operator rather than an absolute per-unit threshold.
summary.zh: 日本家用电冰箱的能效依据由METI管理的《能源使用合理化法》（节能法 / 省エネ法）下的领跑者计划进行管理。电冰箱为指定的领跑者产品品类。METI针对每个品类和额定容积等级设定能效"目标标准值"（目標基準値），以标准制定时市场上最高效产品（"领跑者"）为基准。出货指定产品的制造商和进口商须在相关目标年度以加权出货平均值计达到至少目标标准值；须测量并报告耗电量，出货未达标可触发METI的劝告、公示、命令及对经营者的处罚。耗电量依据JIS C 9801（家用制冷器具——特性及试验方法）测量。与欧盟逐型号EEI硬性限值不同，领跑者义务是针对经营者的整体加权平均义务，而非绝对的逐台门槛。
summary.zht: 日本家用電冰箱的能效依據由METI管理的《能源使用合理化法》（節能法 / 省エネ法）下的領跑者計畫進行管理。電冰箱為指定的領跑者產品品類。METI針對每個品類和額定容積等級設定能效「目標標準值」（目標基準値），以標準制定時市場上最高效產品（「領跑者」）為基準。出貨指定產品的製造商和進口商須在相關目標年度以加權出貨平均值計達到至少目標標準值；須測量並報告耗電量，出貨未達標可觸發METI的勸告、公示、命令及對經營者的處罰。耗電量依據JIS C 9801（家用製冷器具——特性及試驗方法）測量。與歐盟逐型號EEI硬性限值不同，領跑者義務是針對經營者的整體加權平均義務，而非絕對的逐台門檻。

standards_or_laws: Act on the Rational Use of Energy (省エネ法 / Energy Conservation Act) — Top Runner Program framework, administered by METI
METI Top Runner target standard values for household refrigerators (目標基準値) — category and rated-volume-class based
JIS C 9801 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for energy consumption)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the energy labelling system administered by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. The GB 12021.2 framework uses a different test methodology and grade basis than Japan's Top Runner target standard value approach — Chinese energy grades and Japanese Top Runner attainment are not directly comparable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的试验方法及等级基准与日本领跑者目标标准值方法不同——中国能效等级与日本领跑者达标情况不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2框架使用的試驗方法及等級基準與日本領跑者目標標準值方法不同——中國能效等級與日本領跑者達標情況不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three major gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and Japan's Top Runner requirements: (1) Different metric and methodology — the Top Runner target standard value is benchmarked to the Japanese market's best performers per category/volume class and measured to JIS C 9801, whereas GB 12021.2-2015 uses a grade-based framework measured to GB/T 8059; a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee attainment of the Japanese target standard value without independent recalculation to the Japanese methodology. (2) Fleet-average obligation on the business operator — Top Runner compliance is assessed on a weighted shipment-average basis for the importer/manufacturer in Japan, not as a per-model pass/fail; this requires the Japanese-resident operator to track shipment volumes and weighted efficiency, an obligation absent in the Chinese per-model grade system. (3) Test conditions — JIS C 9801 ambient and loading conditions may differ from GB/T 8059, so Chinese consumption figures cannot be assumed valid for Japanese reporting. Energy consumption must be re-measured to JIS C 9801 for the Japanese market.
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与日本领跑者要求之间存在三大差距：（1）指标与方法不同——领跑者目标标准值以日本市场各品类/容积等级的最优产品为基准并依据JIS C 9801测量，而GB 12021.2-2015采用依据GB/T 8059测量的等级框架；中国1级或2级评定不保证在未按日本方法独立重新计算的情况下达到日本目标标准值。（2）针对经营者的整体平均义务——领跑者合规以日本进口商/制造商的加权出货平均值评估，而非逐型号合格/不合格；这要求日本境内经营者追踪出货量和加权能效，此项义务在中国逐型号等级体系中不存在。（3）试验条件——JIS C 9801的环境和负载条件可能与GB/T 8059不同，故中国耗电量数据不能默认对日本申报有效。须依据JIS C 9801为日本市场重新测量耗电量。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與日本領跑者要求之間存在三大差距：（1）指標與方法不同——領跑者目標標準值以日本市場各品類/容積等級的最優產品為基準並依據JIS C 9801測量，而GB 12021.2-2015採用依據GB/T 8059測量的等級框架；中國1級或2級評定不保證在未按日本方法獨立重新計算的情況下達到日本目標標準值。（2）針對經營者的整體平均義務——領跑者合規以日本進口商/製造商的加權出貨平均值評估，而非逐型號合格/不合格；這要求日本境內經營者追蹤出貨量和加權能效，此項義務在中國逐型號等級體系中不存在。（3）試驗條件——JIS C 9801的環境和負載條件可能與GB/T 8059不同，故中國耗電量數據不能默認對日本申報有效。須依據JIS C 9801為日本市場重新測量耗電量。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (operator-level) — Top Runner target standard value compliance under the Act on the Rational Use of Energy is legally required of the manufacturer/importer on a weighted shipment-average basis; non-attainment can trigger METI recommendation, publication, order and penalty
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: METI / Agency for Natural Resources and Energy (ANRE) — Top Runner Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Japan's Top Runner Program under the Act on the Rational Use of Energy is legally binding on the manufacturer/importer for household refrigerators on a weighted shipment-average basis. Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grades do not substitute for Top Runner target standard value attainment — independent measurement to JIS C 9801 and recalculation to the Japanese methodology are required. The obligation falls on the Japanese-resident business operator, not on a per-model registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 日本《能源使用合理化法》下的领跑者计划对家用电冰箱的制造商/进口商以加权出货平均值为基准具有法律约束力。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代领跑者目标标准值达标——须依据JIS C 9801独立测量并按日本方法重新计算。该义务落在日本境内经营者身上，而非逐型号注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 日本《能源使用合理化法》下的領跑者計畫對家用電冰箱的製造商/進口商以加權出貨平均值為基準具有法律約束力。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代領跑者目標標準值達標——須依據JIS C 9801獨立測量並按日本方法重新計算。該義務落在日本境內經營者身上，而非逐型號註冊。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Japanese Energy-Saving Label (省エネラベル) + Uniform Energy-Saving Label (METI)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——日本节能标签（省エネラベル）+ 统一节能标签（METI）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——日本節能標籤（省エネラベル）+ 統一節能標籤（METI）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in Japan must carry Japanese energy-saving labelling under the Energy Saving Labelling Program tied to the Act on the Rational Use of Energy. Two label types apply: (1) the Energy-Saving Labelling (省エネラベリング制度) mark showing the energy-saving achievement ratio (省エネ基準達成率) relative to the Top Runner target standard value, the energy consumption efficiency, and a green/orange achievement indicator; and (2) the Uniform Energy-Saving Label (統一省エネルギーラベル), a multi-star rating (1–5 stars, displayed at point of sale) together with the estimated annual electricity cost (円/年) and the achievement ratio. Labels are based on energy consumption measured to JIS C 9801. Manufacturers and importers calculate and self-declare the figures; retailers display the multi-star label in-store and online. Unlike the EU model, Japan operates no pre-market product-registration database equivalent to EPREL — there is no EPREL-style hard registration gate, but the labelling and Top Runner reporting obligations remain mandatory.
summary.zh: 在日本销售的家用电冰箱须依据与《能源使用合理化法》挂钩的节能标识制度附贴日本节能标签。适用两类标签：（1）节能标识（省エネラベリング制度）标志，显示相对于领跑者目标标准值的节能基准达成率（省エネ基準達成率）、能源消耗效率及绿色/橙色达成指示；（2）统一节能标签（統一省エネルギーラベル），即多星评级（1–5星，在销售点展示）连同预估年耗电费用（円/年）及达成率。标签基于依据JIS C 9801测量的耗电量。制造商和进口商计算并自我声明相关数值；零售商在门店及在线展示多星标签。与欧盟模式不同，日本没有类似EPREL的市场前产品注册数据库——不存在EPREL式硬性注册门槛，但标识及领跑者报告义务仍为强制性。
summary.zht: 在日本銷售的家用電冰箱須依據與《能源使用合理化法》掛鈎的節能標識制度附貼日本節能標籤。適用兩類標籤：（1）節能標識（省エネラベリング制度）標誌，顯示相對於領跑者目標標準值的節能基準達成率（省エネ基準達成率）、能源消耗效率及綠色/橙色達成指示；（2）統一節能標籤（統一省エネルギーラベル），即多星評級（1–5星，在銷售點展示）連同預估年耗電費用（円/年）及達成率。標籤基於依據JIS C 9801測量的耗電量。製造商和進口商計算並自我聲明相關數值；零售商在門店及線上展示多星標籤。與歐盟模式不同，日本沒有類似EPREL的市場前產品註冊數據庫——不存在EPREL式硬性註冊門檻，但標識及領跑者報告義務仍為強制性。

standards_or_laws: Energy Saving Labelling Program (省エネラベリング制度) — under the Act on the Rational Use of Energy, administered by METI
Uniform Energy-Saving Label (統一省エネルギーラベル) — multi-star rating + estimated annual electricity cost, displayed at point of sale
JIS C 9801 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for the labelled figures)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare grade based on testing against GB 12021.2. The Chinese 1-to-5 grade label and Japan's省エネ achievement-ratio / multi-star label are structurally different and not cross-comparable without recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识制度依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，采用中国能效标识（CEL）体系，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明能效等级。中国1至5级标识与日本省エネ达成率/多星标签在结构上存在差异，未经重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識制度依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，採用中國能效標識（CEL）體系，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明能效等級。中國1至5級標識與日本省エネ達成率/多星標籤在結構上存在差異，未經重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two label-and-reporting gaps with no direct Chinese equivalent: (1) Japanese label format and metric — the Uniform Energy-Saving Label (multi-star + estimated annual electricity cost in 円/年) and the省エネ achievement ratio relative to the Top Runner target standard value must be recalculated from JIS C 9801 measurements; the Chinese CEL 1-to-5 grade cannot be reused as the Japanese label, and the Japanese-language label content and point-of-sale display rules must be met. (2) No EPREL-style registration but reporting persists — Japan has no pre-market registration database equivalent to the EU's EPREL, so there is no online registration hard gate; however the manufacturer/importer must still measure to JIS C 9801, compute the achievement ratio and label figures, and (as a designated Top Runner operator) report to METI. Chinese exporters therefore swap an EU EPREL-style registration burden for a Japanese measurement/labelling/Top-Runner-reporting burden — the Chinese CEL satisfies neither.
gap.zh: 两项标识与报告差距在中国无直接对应：（1）日本标签格式与指标——统一节能标签（多星 + 预估年耗电费用円/年）及相对于领跑者目标标准值的省エネ达成率须依据JIS C 9801测量重新计算；中国能效标识（CEL）1至5级不能复用为日本标签，且须满足日文标签内容及销售点展示规则。（2）无EPREL式注册但报告义务仍在——日本没有类似欧盟EPREL的市场前注册数据库，故无在线注册硬性门槛；但制造商/进口商仍须依据JIS C 9801测量、计算达成率及标签数值，并（作为指定领跑者经营者）向METI报告。因此中国出口商以日本的测量/标识/领跑者报告负担取代欧盟EPREL式注册负担——中国能效标识两者均不满足。
gap.zht: 兩項標識與報告差距在中國無直接對應：（1）日本標籤格式與指標——統一節能標籤（多星 + 預估年耗電費用円/年）及相對於領跑者目標標準值的省エネ達成率須依據JIS C 9801測量重新計算；中國能效標識（CEL）1至5級不能複用為日本標籤，且須滿足日文標籤內容及銷售點展示規則。（2）無EPREL式註冊但報告義務仍在——日本沒有類似歐盟EPREL的市場前註冊數據庫，故無線上註冊硬性門檻；但製造商/進口商仍須依據JIS C 9801測量、計算達成率及標籤數值，並（作為指定領跑者經營者）向METI報告。因此中國出口商以日本的測量/標識/領跑者報告負擔取代歐盟EPREL式註冊負擔——中國能效標識兩者均不滿足。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Japanese energy-saving labelling (省エネラベル) and the Uniform Energy-Saving Label display are required for household refrigerators under the Act on the Rational Use of Energy; figures based on JIS C 9801. No EPREL-style pre-market registration database exists in Japan
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: METI / Agency for Natural Resources and Energy (ANRE) — Energy Saving Labelling Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Japanese energy-saving labelling (省エネラベル / Uniform Energy-Saving Label) is mandatory for household refrigerators, based on JIS C 9801 measurements and the Top Runner achievement ratio. Japan has no EPREL-style pre-market registration hard gate, but the Chinese CEL label does not satisfy Japanese labelling obligations — figures must be re-measured to JIS C 9801 and the Japanese-format label produced before sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 日本节能标签（省エネラベル / 统一节能标签）是家用电冰箱的强制要求，基于JIS C 9801测量及领跑者达成率。日本没有EPREL式市场前注册硬性门槛，但中国能效标识不满足日本标识义务——须依据JIS C 9801重新测量并在销售前制作日本格式标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 日本節能標籤（省エネラベル / 統一節能標籤）是家用電冰箱的強制要求，基於JIS C 9801測量及領跑者達成率。日本沒有EPREL式市場前註冊硬性門檻，但中國能效標識不滿足日本標識義務——須依據JIS C 9801重新測量並在銷售前製作日本格式標籤。
